experiment: POPE Thinking Mode: Steering → LSR Validation

alpha_sweep_results.source: vLLM baseline (1500 samples) + HF steered (300 samples)
alpha_sweep_results.conclusion: Direct steering hurts Thinking model by 2-5pp consistently

lsr_validation.conclusion: STRONG SIGNAL: Correct rollouts have higher KL (use images more). LSR is valid GRPO reward.

next_steps.1: Implement LSR as GRPO reward in src/rewards.py or src/trainer.py
next_steps.2: Run GRPO with R_correct + R_LSR on Qwen3-VL-2B (non-Thinking first)
next_steps.3: Compare: R_correct only vs R_correct + R_LSR
next_steps.4: If successful: apply to Thinking model
